$comment: Shared TS config. Every app/service/lib has its own tsconfig that extends this one — single source of truth (no config drift). The `paths` block below is what gives @nx/enforce-module-boundaries its teeth: without it Nx can't resolve @stack/* (apps & services have no `exports`/`main`) and silently SKIPS the tag depConstraints. Values MUST start with `./` (relative to this file) — bare `libs/...` triggers TS5090 since there's no baseUrl. App/service targets need not exist on disk; the boundary rule maps them to a project by root. Apps override `paths` in their own tsconfig, so this doesn't perturb their symlink/exports runtime resolution.
